sso.summary: SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect SSO; Salesforce can act as both Service Provider and Identity Provider.

ulm.summary: SCIM 2.0 user provisioning/deprovisioning via the /services/scim/v2 endpoints, authorized with an OAuth 2.0 access token.

citations.title: Manage Salesforce User Identities with SCIM — Help
SCIM and REST API Reference — Help

entitlements.summary: Profiles/permission sets are rich, but mapping from IdP groups via SCIM is coarse (group membership, not fine-grained permission-set assignment).

citations.title: SCIM and REST API Reference — Help

riskSignals.summary: Event Monitoring / Real-Time Event Monitoring exists, but no documented CAEP / Shared Signals Framework standard transmitter or receiver as of 2026-06.

logout.summary: Session management and SSO logout supported; SAML Single Logout (back-channel) varies by configuration.

tokenRevocation.summary: OAuth 2.0 token revocation endpoint (/services/oauth2/revoke); connected-app session/token management in Setup.
